articles.author: Charlotte Graham-McLay, John Pye, R.J. Rico
articles.title: Australia grants asylum to 5 members of the Iranian women’s soccer team - AP News
articles.description: Australia has granted asylum to five members of the Iranian women’s soccer team who were in the country for a tournament when the Iran war began. The women were transported from their hotel in Gold Coast, Australia “to a safe location” by Australian federal p…
articles.content: GOLD COAST, Australia (AP) Australia granted asylum to five members of the Iranian womens soccer team who were visiting the country for a tournament when the Iran war began, a government minister sai… [+6670 chars]
